content.speakerText: So, Thursday at 2 in the big room, projector and Zoom — got it?
content.speakerTextCn: 所以周四下午两点，大会议室，投影和Zoom，对吧？
expectedAnswers: Yes, booked! I’ll send the calendar invite right away.
Perfect, all set — I’ll confirm it in the system.
Yup, confirmed. Thanks for organizing this!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认信息并表明预订已完成
语言准确性：使用正确语法和场景词汇（如 book, calendar invite）
表达自然度：语气自然，符合口语习惯，无生硬翻译痕迹
关键词覆盖：包含至少两个场景关键词（如 booked, calendar invite, confirmed）

content.speakerText: We’re setting up the team retreat for next Tuesday at 9 in the main hall with sound system and coffee station — is that correct?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们把团队活动安排在下周二上午9点，主厅，带音响系统和咖啡站，对吗？
expectedAnswers: Got it! Reservation confirmed. I’ll update the calendar.
Yes, that’s perfect — I’ve already reserved the space.
All set! I’ll send out the details to everyone this afternoon.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰确认时间、地点、设备并完成预订
语言准确性：动词使用恰当（confirm, reserve, send out），无语法错误
表达自然度：使用口语化表达（Got it, All set），符合职场沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：包含至少两个场景关键词（如 reservation, calendar, sound system）
